# DealWithIt Realty

DealWithIt Realty is a RERA-approved real estate sales company specializing in plot investments in Dholera Special Investment Region (SIR), Gujarat, India.

## Key Projects
- RSC Pride: Residential plots in Dholera SIR, NA/NOC title-clear, RERA-approved.
- Aerox: Residential and commercial plots in Dholera SIR, near Ahmedabad-Dholera highway.

## Pages
- Homepage: https://dealwithit.org.in/
- RSC Pride: https://dealwithit.org.in/projects/pride
- Aerox: https://dealwithit.org.in/projects/aerox

## About
DealWithIt Realty helps Indian and NRI investors purchase title-clear, RERA-approved plots in Dholera SIR with transparent pricing and end-to-end documentation support.

## Sitemap
https://dealwithit.org.in/sitemap.xml
